title: Delete pytest suite and migrate behavior specs
description: Delete all pytest tests and replace coverage with shared Gherkin specs plus matching Behave/Cucumber steps. Ensure Python and Rust run identical feature files.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Deleted python/tests and removed pytest/pytest-cov from python/pyproject.toml. Removed pytest from Makefile and CI, switched coverage to behave. Moved Rust BDD runner to rust/features (specs symlink) and moved step defs to rust/features/steps. Deleted Rust integration/unit tests in rust/tests except cucumber runner. Spec parity check now clean; behave passes shared specs.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Deleted python/tests and removed pytest/pytest-cov from python/pyproject.toml. Removed pytest from Makefile/CI, switched coverage runner to behave. Moved Rust BDD to rust/features (specs symlink and steps) and removed rust unit/integration tests. Spec parity check passes; behave and cargo test pass. Coverage via behave currently 55% (needs follow-up in tskl-pkw.3).

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: python/tests removed or empty. Shared specs under specs/features are the only behavior source. Behave and Cucumber both pass with identical feature files.
